commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh If I whet my glittering sword, and my hand takes hold on judgment; I will render vengeance to my enemies, and will reward them that hate me. Lightning, equally terrible and penetrating: fulminis acta modo. (Virgil, Æneid ix. ) (Calmet) Judgment, to punish with rigour my declared enemies. (Haydock) These verses seem to regard the idolatrous nations, (Menochius) though God will not fail to punish the guilty, wherever they may be found.
